/CIDInit /ProcSet findresource begin 12 dict begin begincmap /CIDSystemInfo <<
/Registry (X+0) /Ordering (T42UV) /Supplement 0 >> def
/CMapName /X+0 def
/CMapType 2 def
1 begincodespacerange <0000> <ffff> endcodespacerange
3 beginbfchar
<0001> <0041>
<0002> <0042>
<0003> <D83DDE00>
endbfchar
2 beginbfrange
<0010> <0013> <0061>
<0020> <0022> [<00E9> <00EA> <00EB>]
endbfrange
endcmap CMapName currentdict /CMap defineresource pop end end
